feedback_message: Keep chest up and knees from caving in
Keep feet shoulder-width apart and mostly forward
Squat until thighs are parallel to the ground
Lower your hips until your knees are near 90 degrees
Step forward into a wide stance and return to neutral between sets
Keep chest upright, head back, and front knee behind toes
Achieve proper depth and stand up fully
Maintain a wide stance with toes turned out
Hold still to calibrate and control movement
Keep your chest up and knees tracking over toes
